Schedule
Tap a day for the full timeline
Wednesday, May 27
Arrival · Opening Night · 81°F partly cloudy
2:47 PM · DCA
Depart Delta 2888 Seat 14E
Wear your black jogger set on the plane
5:37 PM · MIA
Land · Rideshare to Catalina Hotel
~45 min · $25-35 · Not walkable from airport
~6:20 PM
Check in · freshen up · grab a bite
Quick food on Collins Ave. Change into your look. Just tonight's essentials — don't unpack everything.
4:55–6:40 PM · Convention Center Theater #1
Crossroads Screening — Voices of Culture Block #1
You land at 5:37 — already running. Text Okema, show love at the party instead.
7:00–10:00 PM · New World Center
Opening Night Film — Strung confirmed
500 17th St · ~15 min walk from hotel · Film ends right as party starts
10:00 PM–1:00 AM · The Bass Museum
Opening Night Party confirmed
2100 Collins Ave · 5 min walk from hotel · Walk straight over from Strung · Okema will be here
Tonight's look
Vanessa Vest Pant Set — Magenta
Vest + wide-leg pant
Shoes needed
Gold or nude strappy heel
Bag needed
Small crossbody or clutch
Jewelry needed
Gold hoops + bangles
Thursday, May 28
Love Song World Premiere Day · 85°F · Carry your umbrella
9:00–10:00 AM
Breakfast
Long day ahead. Do not skip this.
10:30–11:45 AM · NWC Truist Pavilion
Black Queer Stories & Allyship Panel optional
Sponsored by GLAAD · pick this OR the Strung panel
11:30 AM–12:45 PM · NWC Performance Hall
Peacock's Strung: From Script to Screen optional
Sponsored by Comcast NBCU
11:40 AM–12:40 PM · O Cinema
Cycles of Resilience: Austin's Black History doc
O Cinema · the documentary you wanted to see
1:00–2:00 PM · PROTECTED
Lunch
Sit down. Eat something real. Big night ahead.
2:15–3:30 PM · NWC Performance Hall
Dawn Staley: Built First — How Legacy Is Created optional
Sponsored by Ally Financial · fills fast · leave by 3:30 for premiere prep
3:30–5:30 PM · PROTECTED
Premiere prep — back to hotel
Full look. Hair. Makeup. Everything. This is your producer moment. Do not rush this.
5:00–6:15 PM
A Conversation with Regina King — skip this
Conflicts directly with your premiere. Your film comes first. Always.
5:45–7:30 PM · Convention Center Screening Room 2
Love Song World Premiere YOUR FILM
1901 Convention Center Dr · Arrive by 5:30pm · The anchor of this entire trip.
After 7:30 PM · Convention Center
29th Annual HBO Short Film Award Showcase confirmed
Same building — walk over after Love Song wraps
After showcase
Dinner — celebrate
Premiere night. Treat yourself. Collins Ave or Ocean Drive.
Premiere look
Morning tip: Wear jeans + white tee to panels. Change into this at 3:30pm for premiere prep. Do not sit in a blazer all day in 85° heat.
Pretty in Pink Embroidered Blazer Set — Fuchsia
Structured blazer + matching pant
Shoes needed
Nude or clear heel · gold metallic sandal
Bag needed
Small clutch — blazer is the statement
Jewelry needed
Minimal gold — let the suit do the work
Friday, May 29
Panels · Culture · Hey Ladies Comedy 9:30pm · 86°F hot
8:00–10:00 AM
Beach or pool window
Best morning window. Catalina pool or walk across Collins. Panels start 10:30am.
~10:00 AM
Breakfast
Full panel day — fuel up.
10:30–11:45 AM · Convention Center Theater #1
DC as a Creative Capital — Pathways to Production and Power priority
Sponsored by Motion Picture Association · DC filmmaker. Your lane. Your people.
1:15–2:30 PM · NWC Truist Pavilion
Vertical Money: Microdrama Distribution optional
Sponsored by Hartbeat/BLKTOPIA · relevant for 820 Collective
1:45–3:15 PM · NWC Performance Hall
Netflix's Celebration of Black Television Panel optional
Sponsored by Netflix · conflicts with Vertical Money — choose one
~3:15–4:00 PM
Lunch / rest
Sit. Eat. Regroup. Long evening ahead.
4:00–5:15 PM · NWC Truist Pavilion
BOB Talks: Inspiring Stories, Black-Owned Brands confirmed
Sponsored by Walmart · leave 5:15 to catch end of Griner if you want both
4:30–6:30 PM · Convention Center Theater #1
The Brittney Griner Story confirmed
Sponsored by ESPN · ABFF Sports Track
6:45–8:00 PM · NWC Truist Pavilion
10 Years of Collecting Black Film at NMAAHC confirmed
Sponsored by Smithsonian NMAAHC
~8:00–9:15 PM
Dinner + optional outfit change
NMAAHC ends 8pm, comedy starts 9:30pm — enough time for a quick hotel stop if doing the black dress.
9:30–11:00 PM · NWC Performance Hall
Hey Ladies Comedy Experience confirmed
New World Center · your Comedy Show calendar event
Friday looks — choose your option
Option A — all day
Flare jeans + white tee
Add jewelry for comedy
Option B — evening change
Black one-shoulder dress
Quick hotel change 8–9pm
Saturday, May 30
Awards + White Party · 86°F · Best beach day of the trip
8:00–10:00 AM
Beach or pool — best window of the whole trip
Sunny. No events until noon. Hotel pool or walk across to the beach.
~10:00 AM
Brunch — take your time
Big night ahead. Sit-down brunch near the hotel.
11:00 AM–12:15 PM · NWC Truist Pavilion
Storyteller Unleashed: Amazon MGM Originals Panel optional
Sponsored by Amazon MGM Studios
12:30–1:45 PM · NWC Performance Hall
Kanan's Evolution: Power Book III Season 5 Panel confirmed
Sponsored by Warner Bros Television
~2:00–3:30 PM · PROTECTED
Lunch + Awards prep begins
Eat a real meal — you're going until 1am. Give yourself 2+ hours to get ready.
Evening · New World Center
Best of the ABFF Awards Ceremony confirmed
500 17th St · ~15 min walk from hotel · Confirm exact time on ABFF site
After Awards · Club M2
The Legendary White Party: Legacy Edition confirmed
Club M2 · 1235 Washington Ave · ~10 min walk · Lexus photo activation from 10:30pm — dress for the camera
Before bed Saturday night
Pack your bags
Pack tonight so Sunday morning is just breakfast and out. You will be tired.
Awards + White Party look
Evelyn Satin Jumpsuit — White
Floral embroidered bust · wide-leg satin · one look, two venues
Shoes needed
Gold metallic heel — not white-on-white with satin
Undergarments
Strapless or adhesive bra — satin shows everything
Bag needed
Small evening bag
Jewelry needed
Pull from the floral embroidery — pink/green tones · gold or pearl
Sunday, May 31
Fly Home · Leave hotel by 9am · Pack Saturday night
7:30–8:30 AM
Quick breakfast
If you packed Saturday night this is just breakfast and out.
8:30–9:00 AM LATEST
Check out · Rideshare to MIA
~45 min to airport · Sunday TSA crowds · do not cut this close
11:10 AM · MIA
Delta 2888 departs Seat 14E
Arrives DCA 1:49pm · Welcome home
